allow: Bash(node -e " const readline = require\('readline'\); const rl = readline.createInterface\({ input: process.stdin }\); const results = []; rl.on\('line', \(line\) => { const fields = []; let current = ''; let inQuotes = false; for \(let i = 0; i < line.length; i++\) { const ch = line[i]; if \(ch === '\\"'\) { inQuotes = !inQuotes; } else if \(ch === ',' && !inQuotes\) { fields.push\(current\); current = ''; } else { current += ch; } } fields.push\(current\); const iata = fields[4]; const timezone = fields[11]; const type = fields[12]; if \( iata && iata.length === 3 && iata !== '\\\\\\\\N' && timezone && timezone !== '\\\\\\\\N' && timezone.includes\('/'\) && type === 'airport' \) { results.push\({ iata, city: fields[2] ?? '', country: fields[3] ?? '', name: fields[1] ?? '', timezone }\); } }\); rl.on\('close', \(\) => { const seen = new Set\(\); const unique = results.filter\(a => { if \(seen.has\(a.iata\)\) return false; seen.add\(a.iata\); return true; }\); process.stdout.write\(JSON.stringify\(unique, null, 2\)\); }\); " echo "Done: $?")
